name: Dana Carvey
bio: Dana Carvey is an American stand-up comedian and actor best known for his seven seasons on Saturday Night Live from 1986 to 1993, where he created enduring characters such as the Church Lady and Garth Algar. A virtuoso impressionist, he is regarded as one of the most versatile sketch and stand-up performers of his generation and won a Primetime Emmy for his SNL work.

timeline.ev: Stars as Garth in Waynes World

accolades: Primetime Emmy Award winner for Saturday Night Live
